#-----Adjoint triangles-----#
Working out the dual version of Dubuc's Adjoint Triangles with Fernandos labels

% https://q.uiver.app/#
\[\begin{tikzcd}
& {UR = U'} && F && {RF'} \\
{\mathbb{A}} && {\mathbb{B}} & FUR && {RF'UR} \\
& {\mathbb{C}} && R && {RF'U'} \\
& {JU=U'} && {F'J} && F \\
{\mathbb{A}} && {\mathbb{B}} & JUF && {JUF'J} \\
& {\mathbb{C}} && J && {U'F'J} \\
& {JR=U} && LJ && E \\
{\mathbb{B}} && {\mathbb{A}} & JRE && JRLJ \\
& {\mathbb{C}} && J && ULJ
\arrow["\Theta", from=1-4, to=1-6]
\arrow["R", from=2-1, to=2-3]
\arrow[""{name=0, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "{U'}"', shift right=2, from=2-1, to=3-2]
\arrow[""{name=1, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "U", shift left=2, from=2-3, to=3-2]
\arrow["{\Theta UR}", from=2-4, to=2-6]
\arrow["{\varepsilon_R}"', from=2-4, to=3-4]
\arrow["{RF'1}", from=2-6, to=3-6]
\arrow[""{name=2, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "{F'}"', shift right, from=3-2, to=2-1]
\arrow[""{name=3, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "F", shift left, from=3-2, to=2-3]
\arrow["{R\varepsilon'}", from=3-6, to=3-4]
\arrow["\Theta", from=4-4, to=4-6]
\arrow[""{name=4, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "{F'}", shift left=2, from=5-1, to=6-2]
\arrow["J"', from=5-3, to=5-1]
\arrow[""{name=5, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "F"', shift right=2, from=5-3, to=6-2]
\arrow["{JU\Theta}"', from=5-6, to=5-4]
\arrow[""{name=6, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "{U'}", shift left=2, from=6-2, to=5-1]
\arrow[""{name=7, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "U"', shift right, from=6-2, to=5-3]
\arrow["{J\eta}", from=6-4, to=5-4]
\arrow["{\eta'J}"', from=6-4, to=6-6]
\arrow["{1F'J}"', from=6-6, to=5-6]
\arrow["\Theta", from=7-4, to=7-6]
\arrow[""{name=8, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "L", shift left, from=8-1, to=9-2]
\arrow["J"', from=8-3, to=8-1]
\arrow[""{name=9, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "E"', shift right, from=8-3, to=9-2]
\arrow["{JR\Theta}"', from=8-6, to=8-4]
\arrow["1LJ", from=8-6, to=9-6]
\arrow[""{name=10, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "U", shift left=2, from=9-2, to=8-1]
\arrow[""{name=11, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "R"', shift right=2, from=9-2, to=8-3]
\arrow["{J\rho}", from=9-4, to=8-4]
\arrow["{\eta J}"', from=9-4, to=9-6]
\arrow["\dashv"{anchor=center, rotate=-51}, draw=none, from=3, to=1]
\arrow["\dashv"{anchor=center, rotate=-129}, draw=none, from=2, to=0]
\arrow["\dashv"{anchor=center, rotate=-129}, draw=none, from=4, to=6]
\arrow["\dashv"{anchor=center, rotate=-51}, draw=none, from=5, to=7]
\arrow["\dashv"{anchor=center, rotate=-129}, draw=none, from=8, to=10]
\arrow["\dashv"{anchor=center, rotate=-51}, draw=none, from=9, to=11]
\end{tikzcd}\]
